prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 90.4 kg; Height 169.4 cm; BMI 31.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 202mg/dL; current 208mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 91.1kg; 9 months ago 93.3kg; 6 months ago 87.9kg; 3 months ago 86.3kg; current 90.4kg), Height (12 months ago 169.4cm; 9 months ago 169.4cm; 6 months ago 169.4cm; 3 months ago 169.4cm; current 169.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 95U/L; 9 months ago 94U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 87U/L; current 92U/L), AST (12 months ago 101U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 92U/L; 3 months ago 91U/L; current 97U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 66mg/g; 9 months ago 51mg/g; 6 months ago 56mg/g; 3 months ago 57mg/g; current 76mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 104mg/dL; 6 months ago 104mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
